name: Iter17 — Dashboard Comparisons tab renders content and badge count
description: When a user clicks the Comparisons tab inside the Dashboard page, the comparisons table or empty state is shown. The tab button has a live badge count. Switching back to Reviews tab shows the reviews table again.

planSteps.description: Verify the Reviews tab is active by default and the reviews history table is visible
Verify the Comparisons tab button is visible and has a numeric badge showing its count
Verify the comparisons section is now visible in the main content area, showing either a table of saved comparisons or a clear empty-state message — not the reviews table
Verify the reviews history table is visible again and the Comparisons content is no longer shown
